nodes.title: Ridgeline Studio operating notes
nodes.summary: How Ridgeline Studio runs during the Skylark 1.0 launch window: one gate at a time, every durable change through the review queue, cockpit stays read-only.

nodes.title: Skylark user-guide draft import
nodes.summary: Imported draft of the Skylark weather-journal user guide: daily loop, tab meanings, proof rules for judging launch readiness, and v1.0 limits.

nodes.title: Routine intake capture
nodes.summary: Messy bullets from the studio pair describing the launch-week cadence: standup, feedback triage, support digest, ship review, and monthly books.

nodes.title: Playtest feedback synthesis, round one
nodes.summary: Synthesis of 25 beta playtest sessions for Skylark: onboarding friction, the units-toggle confusion (finding C002), and the morning journaling pattern.

nodes.title: Skylark pricing decision worksheet
nodes.summary: Options and margins for Skylark 1.0 pricing: one-time purchase, subscription, and freemium tip-jar paths, with the locked one-time recommendation.

nodes.title: App-store submission checklist
nodes.summary: Step-by-step store submission checklist for Skylark 1.0: listing assets, privacy labels, review notes, dry run, and the 2026-06-24 submission cutoff.

nodes.title: Beta survey results, round one
nodes.summary: Aggregated beta survey results: 21 of 25 responses, morning journaling majority, top feature requests, and willingness-to-pay signal for one-time pricing.

nodes.title: Website and docs copy review
nodes.summary: Copy review pass over ridgeline.example and the Skylark docs: quickstart gaps, pricing page wording, and changelog page plan.

nodes.title: Support inbox digest, week 26
nodes.summary: Weekly support digest: 14 beta tickets, top themes (units toggle fixed, reminder timing, export requests), and reply-macro coverage.

nodes.title: Launch-week readiness review
nodes.summary: Final readiness review before the store submission gate: verification status of the launch demo package, open risks, and the parked Daily Operations decision.

nodes.title: Skylark 1.0 Launch
nodes.summary: Skylark, the weather-journal app, live in the store as a one-time purchase with a calm launch week and no surprise regressions.

nodes.title: Ridgeline Website & Docs
nodes.summary: ridgeline.example tells the local-first story, the docs cover the 1.0 flow, and the changelog updates itself from release notes.

nodes.title: Beta Community & Support
nodes.summary: Beta testers feel heard through launch week: tickets answered inside 24 hours, themes digested weekly, survey loop feeding v1.1 scope.

nodes.title: Stand up the Skylark beta build pipeline
nodes.summary: Done: beta builds cut from main with one command and a smoke check.

nodes.title: Recruit 25 beta playtesters
nodes.summary: Done: 25 testers onboarded with the local-only privacy note.

nodes.title: Baseline crash reporting for beta builds
nodes.summary: Done: opt-in crash reports flowing; 99.4% crash-free sessions.

nodes.title: Weather provider fallback cache
nodes.summary: Done: cached forecasts serve when the provider is unreachable.

nodes.title: Lock the launch-readiness proof package scope
nodes.summary: Done: PROOF-FLAGSHIP-001 scoped to demo, smoke check, and review doc.

nodes.title: Fold round-one playtest fixes into onboarding
nodes.summary: Done: C002 units-toggle relabel and morning-reminder default shipped in beta 4.

nodes.title: Ship the pricing update to the beta build
nodes.summary: Done: one-time purchase at 6 USD wired per DEC-001.

nodes.title: Finalize store listing assets
nodes.summary: Done: six screenshots, subtitle, and description frozen with the pricing copy.

nodes.title: Run the store submission dry run
nodes.summary: Walk the full submission on a clean device profile and record the sign-off in the checklist.

nodes.title: Plan the post-launch telemetry review
nodes.summary: Draft what launch-week signals we read (crash-free rate, store reviews, support themes) and when.

nodes.title: Accessibility pass on the journal editor
nodes.summary: Done: labels, contrast, and dynamic type verified on the editor and forecast strip.

nodes.title: Crash-report triage rotation
nodes.summary: Keep the daily triage rotation through launch week; escalate anything above 0.5% sessions.

nodes.title: Final app icon set
nodes.summary: Done: icon set exported for all required sizes and checked into the listing kit.

nodes.title: Submit Skylark 1.0 to the app store
nodes.summary: Submit with the expedite note once the TASK-044 dry-run sign-off is recorded.

nodes.title: Assemble the launch press kit
nodes.summary: Bundle screenshots, the one-paragraph story, and the local-first privacy note into one folder.

nodes.title: Write the 1.0 release notes
nodes.summary: Draft release notes from the beta 4 change list once the feature freeze is confirmed.

nodes.title: Draft the refund policy
nodes.summary: Done: plain-language refund wording approved and mirrored on the pricing page.

nodes.title: Launch-day comms checklist
nodes.summary: List every launch-day message (store live note, beta thank-you, website banner) with owner and timing.

nodes.title: Daily Operations restart decision
nodes.summary: Daily Operations remains parked until the studio explicitly restarts it after the launch retro.

nodes.title: Launch pricing approval packet
nodes.summary: Approve, revise, or reject the pending pricing packet confirming 6 USD one-time against the store listing copy.

nodes.title: Docs information architecture
nodes.summary: Done: docs restructured into quickstart, guides, settings glossary, and changelog.

nodes.title: Rewrite the Skylark quickstart for 1.0
nodes.summary: Replace beta screenshots and first-run copy with the 1.0 flow, then capture the walkthrough for PROOF-WEB-001.

nodes.title: Changelog page automation
nodes.summary: Generate the changelog page from release notes instead of hand-editing it.

nodes.title: Pricing page copy
nodes.summary: Done: pricing page states 6 USD one-time with the plain refund wording.

nodes.title: Docs search index
nodes.summary: Index the settings glossary so searches like 'units' return the right page.

nodes.title: Status page and uptime monitor
nodes.summary: Stand up the status page once the hosting cutover lands.

nodes.title: Newsletter signup embed
nodes.summary: Add the double-opt-in signup embed to the launch post template.

nodes.title: Skylark context usage loop
nodes.summary: Run the imported user-guide loop daily: gate check, feedback triage, one slice, review packet.

nodes.title: Set up the self-hosted beta forum
nodes.summary: Done: forum live for beta testers with the local-only privacy note pinned.

nodes.title: Run beta survey round one
nodes.summary: Done: 21 of 25 responses collected and summarized into the survey results source.

nodes.title: Support reply macros
nodes.summary: Finish the refund-steps and store-review-timeline macros before launch day.

nodes.title: Weekly support digest automation
nodes.summary: Automate the weekly ticket-theme digest so launch-week volume stays readable.

nodes.title: Launch-week office hours
nodes.summary: Schedule two open office-hour blocks in the forum for launch week and pin the announcement.

nodes.title: Moderation guidelines v1
nodes.summary: Write the short moderation guideline page before the forum opens beyond beta testers.

nodes.title: Beta survey round two
nodes.summary: Send the post-launch survey once the survey-tooling fix lands.

nodes.title: Beta thank-you notes and credits
nodes.summary: Write the thank-you note for all 25 testers and add opt-in credits to the about screen copy.

nodes.title: Launch retro and v1.1 scope draft
nodes.summary: Run the retro after launch week and draft v1.1 scope from survey requests: export, reminder timing, rain alerts.

nodes.title: Beta survey results packet
nodes.summary: Aggregated round-one survey packet: response tables, habit split, pricing signal, and the request ranking that feeds the v1.1 scope draft.

nodes.title: Skylark launch-readiness demo package
nodes.summary: Local, reviewable proof that Skylark 1.0 is launch-ready: deterministic demo build, smoke check, and a review doc tied to the submission checklist.

nodes.title: Docs quickstart walkthrough package
nodes.summary: Screen-by-screen capture of the rewritten 1.0 quickstart so the docs can be judged on visible proof instead of memory.

nodes.title: Launch standup
nodes.summary: Open Today and read the current gate / Name blockers in one sentence each / Pick at most one decision to make today

nodes.title: Beta feedback triage
nodes.summary: Label new playtest notes and support tickets / Escalate anything crash-related to the QA rotation / File everything else against a task or the v1.1 list

nodes.title: Support digest compile
nodes.summary: Group the week's tickets into themes / Write the one-page digest and catalog it as a source / Update macro coverage gaps in TASK-072

nodes.title: Ship review
nodes.summary: List what actually shipped this week / Re-run smoke checks on touched proof packages / Prune stale tasks and park anything not moving

nodes.title: Books and invoices close
nodes.summary: Reconcile the month's receipts / Send outstanding invoices / File the close note

nodes.title: One-time purchase at 6 USD
nodes.summary: 16 of 21 survey respondents preferred paying once, the median acceptable price was 5-7 USD, and one SKU keeps launch support simple.

nodes.title: Launch 2026-06-26
nodes.summary: Round-one playtest found no launch blockers and the readiness review confirmed the proof package; slipping only stretches the crunch.

nodes.title: Self-hosted forum
nodes.summary: Matches the local-first story, keeps tester feedback under studio control, and threads digest better into weekly support themes.

nodes.title: Static site from the docs repo
nodes.summary: Two people cannot babysit a CMS during launch week; static output keeps the changelog automation path (TASK-062) simple.

nodes.title: 24-hour first reply during launch week
nodes.summary: Week-26 volume was handled inside 24 hours with two people; macros and office hours should absorb the launch spike, but the commitment is not locked yet.

nodes.title: Single provider with cached fallback
nodes.summary: The fallback cache (TASK-022) covered every outage in beta; integrating a second provider now adds risk during the freeze.

nodes.title: Skylark beta users journal most consistently in the morning; onboarding defaults to a morning reminder.
nodes.summary: Skylark beta users journal most consistently in the morning; onboarding defaults to a morning reminder.

nodes.title: Playtesters read the original units toggle as a theme switch; the C002 relabel in beta 4 ended the confusion and the related support tickets.
nodes.summary: Playtesters read the original units toggle as a theme switch; the C002 relabel in beta 4 ended the confusion and the related support tickets.

nodes.title: Playtest finding C002: promote the units-toggle insight and the morning-journaling insight to memory
nodes.summary: Add MC-001 (morning reminder default) and MC-002 (units-toggle confusion resolved by the C002 relabel) as approved memory claims with sources.

nodes.title: Promote the launch-week routines from the 2026-06-13 intake capture
nodes.summary: Convert five intake bullets into structured routines: launch standup, feedback triage, support digest, ship review, and the parked monthly books close.

nodes.title: Register the Skylark launch-readiness demo package as the flagship proof artifact
nodes.summary: Add PROOF-FLAGSHIP-001 with its demo, smoke script, review doc, verification counts, and the read-only approval boundary.

nodes.title: Skylark 1.0 launch pricing review packet
nodes.summary: Confirm the locked 6 USD one-time price against the frozen store listing copy before TASK-058 promotion. No memory or state writes.

nodes.title: contacts_action
nodes.summary: Tester contact details are never read or written by the app in V0.

nodes.title: daily_brief
nodes.summary: The daily brief is a proposal surface; it recommends one move and writes nothing.

nodes.title: dashboard_refresh
nodes.summary: Re-reading local state and the graph index is always safe; no durable write.

nodes.title: draft_review_item
nodes.summary: Prepare a review packet targeting reviews/queue.json. Do not write memory or state directly.

nodes.title: explain_relationship
nodes.summary: Explain why a connection exists using visible evidence only.

nodes.title: external_write
nodes.summary: Anything leaving the machine (website publish, store submission copy, outbound messages) needs its own approved packet.

nodes.title: finance_action
nodes.summary: Invoices, refunds, and any money movement stay outside the system until permissioning is proven.

nodes.title: memory_write
nodes.summary: Memory claims are promoted only through an approved review packet; no automatic memory promotion in V0.

nodes.title: project_state_update
nodes.summary: Project, task, and routine state changes move through the review queue before promotion.

nodes.title: raw_source_rewrite
nodes.summary: Raw sources are append-only truth; rewriting them is forbidden in V0.

nodes.title: source_inspect
nodes.summary: Inspect source metadata already loaded by the app. No durable write.

nodes.title: automatic-low-risk
nodes.summary: The app may do this on its own; read-only or trivially reversible.

nodes.title: draft-for-approval
nodes.summary: The action becomes a review packet in reviews/queue.json and waits for an explicit approve, revise, or reject.

nodes.title: forbidden-in-V0
nodes.summary: The action cannot execute in V0 at all, regardless of approval.

nodes.title: suggest-only
nodes.summary: The app may propose this in the interface; nothing durable changes without the operator.

nodes.title: daily-execution-runner
nodes.summary: Read the current gate (TASK-050), name blockers in one sentence each, and pick today's single decision.

nodes.title: daily-command-review
nodes.summary: Finish the TASK-044 submission dry run before anything else today; it is the only item blocking TASK-050.

nodes.title: dry-run-signoff
nodes.summary: TASK-050 is blocked by dry-run-signoff.

nodes.title: feature-freeze
nodes.summary: TASK-052 is blocked by feature-freeze.

nodes.title: hosting-cutover
nodes.summary: TASK-065 is blocked by hosting-cutover.

nodes.title: survey-tooling-fix
nodes.summary: TASK-077 is blocked by survey-tooling-fix.

nodes.title: reviews/queue.json
nodes.summary: REV-PREVIEW-PROJECT-PROJ-001-LAUNCH-PRICING-PACKET targets reviews/queue.json.

nodes.title: state/proof-artifacts.json
nodes.summary: REV-2026-06-21-001 targets state/proof-artifacts.json.

nodes.title: state/routines.json
nodes.summary: REV-2026-06-17-001 targets state/routines.json.

nodes.title: wiki/memory-claims.json
nodes.summary: ERF-C002 targets wiki/memory-claims.json.
